query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph showing sunlight filtering through sheer window curtains, creating vertical bands of light and shadow across the fabric. The silhouette of a small cat is visible near the lower right, cast against the illuminated material. Dark shapes suggesting furniture or bedding appear along the bottom edge of the frame, and the translucent curtains reveal the faint structure of a window behind them.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph showing sunlight filtering through sheer window curtains, covered in heavy analog film grain that creates a rough, tactile, archival surface texture. Vertical bands of light and shadow fall across the fabric, where the silhouette of a small cat appears near the lower right and dark shapes line the bottom edge, yet all elements lack fine detail and resolve into soft, smeared, indistinct forms. The grayscale palette is muted, washed-out, and faded, with low vibrancy across the tonal range.
